title: Decadent Middle Eastern Sweet Potatoes Hummus
description: A rich and creamy hummus dish featuring sweet potatoes, perfect for a brunch mood, this Jain-friendly recipe is cooked to perfection in a tagine pot. The cheese-pull effect adds a delightful twist to this traditional Middle Eastern dip.
instructions: Pressure cook the sweet potatoes in a tagine pot with 2 cups of water for 10 minutes.
Drain the sweet potatoes and let them cool.
In a blender, combine the chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, garlic, and salt, and blend until smooth.
Add the cooked sweet potatoes to the blender and blend until well combined.
With the blender running, slowly pour in the olive oil and continue blending until the hummus is creamy and smooth.
Transfer the hummus to a serving bowl and top with paprika and vegan mozzarella shreds.
Use a kitchen torch to melt the mozzarella shreds and create a cheese-pull effect.
Serve the hummus warm, garnished with additional paprika and parsley if desired.
